_comment: 26 entries covering A–Z. Each synonym is headword + "_syn".

meta.name: prep-mini
meta.author: CrossPoint Test Suite
meta.description: Small synthetic dictionary for per-book pre-processing tests. All 4 steps required.
meta._comment: generate_oft: intentionally absent — device generates idx.oft and syn.oft

entries.definition: A round fruit with red or green skin and a crisp white interior.
A long seat, typically of wood or stone, for several people.
A visible mass of condensed water vapour floating in the atmosphere.
To be carried slowly by a current of air or water.
A small piece of burning or glowing coal or wood in a dying fire.
A hard grey rock that produces sparks when struck against steel.
A small group or stand of trees without undergrowth.
A jointed device on which a door, gate, or lid swings.
A small arm of the sea, a lake, or a river.
To engage in a contest where two mounted knights charge with lances.
A small hill or mound.
A metal bar that drops into a notch to fasten a gate or door.
A tree or shrub with lobed leaves and winged seeds, valued for timber and syrup.
A V-shaped cut in a surface or edge.
The curved path of a celestial body or spacecraft around a star or planet.
A long flat piece of timber, used in building floors, decks, and fences.
A warm bed covering made of padding enclosed between layers of fabric.
A long narrow hilltop or mountain range.
A fine-grained sedimentary rock formed from compressed mud or clay.
Relating to or affected by tides.
To undo the tied parts of something; to loosen a knot.
A device for controlling the passage of fluid through a pipe or duct.
A level quayside area to which a ship may be moored for loading.
A heavy inert gaseous element present in the atmosphere in trace amounts.
To produce or provide; also to give way under pressure.
Relating to or divided into zones.
